question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention the specific chapters or main sections of the thesis (e.g., Literature Review, Methodology, Implementation, Results). To improve, add a paragraph explicitly stating what each chapter of the work covers.

question: Description
feedback: While the text describes the problem and the technical approach (using a single RGB camera and machine learning), it does not describe the contents of the thesis sections themselves. You should briefly summarize what will be presented in the subsequent chapters of your work.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is missing. The reader knows the technical goal, but does not know how the thesis is organized. To improve, include a roadmap at the end of the introduction that outlines the logical flow of the document.
